title: Historical Post-058 Host Query Engine Opening Or Defer Decision
historical_note: This record preserves one earlier Dev Residency decision slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform on 2026-05-07. It is historical provenance, not a live host-query-engine selector for current repo operations.
current_routing: use PROJECT_STATUS.md for the current residue-retirement lane and latest completed packets
use docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md for the remaining post-cutover boundary closeout queue
use this record only when historical provenance is needed for the earlier Dev Residency 059 host-query-engine decision slice preserved here
objective: Decide whether the asymmetric post-058 live-DSN posture justifies opening a separate bounded host-query-engine lane now, or whether the deferred Operations Visibility seams should remain on explicit hold without widening host query capability.
dependency_note: Packet 058 resolved the live-data question by proving a real workstation live-DSN HOLD verdict and also documented that the current host mirror can only degrade truthfully to UNAVAILABLE under the same live-DSN request.
decision_requirements: Do not treat the host UNAVAILABLE posture as a blocker if the controlling business truth is already proven from a governed live-DSN workstation path.
Prefer the lower-variance operational boundary unless a concrete current requirement depends on authoritative host-side live querying.
Do not install host packages or widen AI-services admission by implication.
Name exactly one next packet candidate.
decision_rationale: Packet 058 already established the controlling business truth from a governed live Supabase DSN: both deferred Operations Visibility views still have zero rows and therefore remain on hold.
The current truthful reopen trigger is live-data change, not host capability gap. Opening a host-query-engine lane now would widen operational surface without changing the current decision.

The existing host graceful-degrade path is sufficient for the current boundary because no active packet, consumer, or promotion gate requires authoritative live-DSN execution specifically from `/home/olares/code/apex`.
next_packet_candidate: No new packet is required until live deferred-view data changes or a concrete host-side live-query requirement appears.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-06 as the post-058 decision surface. Packet 059 keeps the separate host-query-engine lane closed for now because Packet 058 already proved the governing business state from the workstation live-DSN path and the current deferred Operations Visibility seams remain empty on data truth rather than host capability debt.
next_action: Keep `v_resource_allocation` and `v_equipment_needs` on explicit hold until a later live-data rerun returns non-zero counts, or open a separate bounded host-query-engine lane only if a concrete future requirement depends on authoritative live-DSN execution from `/home/olares/code/apex`.
